metadata.title: Automation Readiness Scorecard
metadata.description: JSON schema for scoring SMB automation readiness.
metadata.author: SMB AI Workflow & Agent Builder

scoringScale: 0-3 (0 = Not ready, 1 = Needs cleanup, 2 = Mostly ready, 3 = Ready for pilot)

workflowClarity.label: Workflow Clarity
workflowClarity.description: How well defined and documented is the process?
workflowClarity.score0: No documentation, steps change every time.
workflowClarity.score1: Vague understanding, resides in one person's head.

processConsistency.label: Process Consistency
processConsistency.description: How often does the process follow the exact same steps?

dataQuality.label: Data Quality
dataQuality.description: Is the required data accurate, accessible, and structured?
dataQuality.score0: Data is missing or completely unstructured (e.g., messy handwritten notes).
dataQuality.score1: Data exists but requires manual cleanup before use.
dataQuality.score2: Data is mostly structured but spread across systems.
dataQuality.score3: Data is clean, structured, and centralized.

toolAccess.label: Tool Access
toolAccess.description: Do the tools support automation (APIs, Webhooks, Integrations)?
improvementSuggestions: Evaluate modern tool alternatives if necessary

ownership.label: Ownership
ownership.description: Is there a clear owner responsible for the process and its outcomes?
ownership.score2: Clear owner, but lacks authority to change process.

riskLevel.label: Risk Level
riskLevel.description: What happens if the automation fails or hallucinates?
riskLevel.score0: High risk (legal, financial, compliance, medical damage).
riskLevel.score1: Moderate risk (customer trust damage, significant time loss).

humanReviewPlan.label: Human Review Plan
humanReviewPlan.description: Is there a plan for humans to review sensitive outputs?
humanReviewPlan.score1: Reactive review only when customers complain.
humanReviewPlan.score3: Built-in review step before action for sensitive tasks.
improvementSuggestions: Add a 'Draft' state requiring human click to send

customerExperienceImpact.label: Customer Experience Impact
customerExperienceImpact.description: How will automation affect the customer?

measurementPlan.label: Measurement Plan
measurementPlan.score3: Clear metrics (e.g., response time, error rate).

rollbackPlan.label: Rollback Plan
rollbackPlan.description: Can you revert to the manual process easily if the automation breaks?
rollbackPlan.score0: No, manual process knowledge is lost.
rollbackPlan.score1: Yes, but it would be very painful.

scoringGuidance: Score each category from 0 to 3. Sum the scores for the total. Use the readiness bands to determine the recommendation.

exampleScorecard.recommendation: Ready for automation pilot with draft-only review for overdue accounts.
